## Fast Checks

| Check | Command or method | Expected |
|---|---|---|
| Tool file exists | `Test-Path registry/{TOOL_NAME}.py` | `True` |
| Docs exist | Check `docs/tools/{TOOL_NAME}/` | blueprint, guidance, test_record, troubleshoot |
| Tool is approved | Check `registry/TOOL_INDEX.md` | Tool appears in Approved Tools |
